titles.title: I Want to Do Thy Will Oh Lord.

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The cross that you bear, May be hard to carry, And every pain you feel so hard To understand, But every pain that you feel, He died just to heal, I want to do Thy Will, Oh Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I want to do Thy Wil, Oh Lord, I want to do Thy Will, Oh Lord, Take me and break me, Mold me and make me, I want to do Thy Will, Oh Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He paid the price, The sacrifice with His Blood at Calvary, He stood alone in Pilate's judgment hall, He took the Cross, paid the cost, For my soul that was lost, I want to do Thy Will, Oh Lord.
